subcodes.first_line: O thou who proclaimeth the Covenant in those far-flung horizons! Thy letter dated the fourteenth of Muharram hath been received, and this day the reply is written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ینادی بالمیثاق فی تلک الافاق مکتوب مورخ بچهاردهم محرم الیوم جواب مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @obedience to and respect for government authority
